title: Sensofusion Introduces Sensofusion Aviation, Taking Counter-Drone Systems to the Skies
summary: HELSINKI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Rapidly growing Finnish defence technology company Sensofusion has acquired the Finnish aircraft manufacturer Atol Aviation. The acquisition brings aircraft and unmanned aircraft manufacturing expertise and production capacity into the Sensofusion group, further expanding the company's ability to conduct air-to-ground sensor reconnaissance.
